name: shared-hooks-dead-files
title: Shared hooks distribution: remove dead hook files per platform
description: writeSharedHooks + collectSharedHooks dump every shared-hooks/*.py into every platform regardless of whether the platform's hooks.json/settings actually reference it. Result: statusline.py is a dead file on cursor/codex/gemini/qoder/copilot/codebuddy/droid; kiro additionally has dead session-start.py and inject-workflow-state.py. Fix: centralize per-platform hook capability, align the two distribution paths, ship a safe-file-delete migration for existing installs.
creator: taosu
